sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63211" key="liqo/rrinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθό-ρρῑνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with stony skin</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χελώνη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:76:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
